query: SELECT properties.$pathname AS path, countIf(event='popup_shown') AS shown, countIf(event='popup_form_submitted') AS submits, countIf(event='popup_dismissed') AS dismisses FROM events WHERE event IN ('popup_shown','popup_form_submitted','popup_dismissed') AND timestamp >= '2026-03-29' AND timestamp <= '2026-04-19' AND properties.$ip != '137.103.50.217' GROUP BY path ORDER BY shown DESC
